body: The capital of France is Paris.
The speed of light in a vacuum is about 299,792,458 metres per second (about 300,000 km/s).
Water freezes at 0 degrees Celsius (32 degrees Fahrenheit) at standard atmospheric pressure.
Romeo and Juliet was written by William Shakespeare.

key: largest planet in the solar system
body: The largest planet in the Solar System is Jupiter.
